title: [Outdated upload] Hotel Mario Ending (Improved Audio)
description:
This video is outdated and obsolote. Nowadays, there exist raw video, audio and gif formats of these Hotel Mario everywhere on the internet.

Old descrption:

Download the clip here: http://www.megaupload.com/?d=7KKHU6T1

No jokes here.
I was fed up that there isn't any Hotel Mario ending clips without the ear raping tones.
So, what did I do? Ripped the ending audio from a crappy CD-i emulator and inserted it on Quebecgamers.com's video clip. It was pointless to video cap the emulator, due to the backgrounds in the cutscenes being glitchy (either an emulator issue or an issue with the iso being a bootleg).

Thank god that an "unlock all levels" cheat existed in the game and that I have a gamepad that works on the emulator, since that made me easier to reach the last level without getting error messages about the disc has become dirty-thing. And not only that, it took long for me to learn how to take advantage of Bowser's attacks since he can behave a little different depending on where Mario is located.
It was easier to learn about Iggy's attacks though.

The improved audio's quality doesn't match with the audio from Ratmus1's or CDiFan237's better Hotel Mario clips, but at least you won't get that ear raping feeling to it. I did try to clean up some crispieness of the audio as much as I could without fudging up the quality.

Because of my effort, I should deserve more kisses than what Mario and Luigi got. =(


Oh, and feel very free to use this clip on your YouTube poops.
